lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Well, it's funny you should ask that actually, I run the local parcel service to the mainland.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Parcel service?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Yes, we sometimes get asked to send items back to the mainland. We can send items to individuals' bank accounts, for a small fee of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: It costs 10 trading sticks per item, unfortunately, even stackable items cost the same.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are trading sticks and how do I get some?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Trading sticks are our local currency, you could perhaps earn some trading sticks by doing some work around the village.

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Have a chat with Murcaily, I think he was looking for someone to help him, he works near the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus' hut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I send a parcel please?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: It costs at least 10 trading sticks to use this service. Sorry but you don't have enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Of course...which items would you like to send to your bank?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been doing some work around the village.

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Hey, I've seen you working around the village. You've been doing a lot of good work around here for us. Let me give you something for your trouble.

sections.title: If the player is wearing a tribal mask

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem....oh, I'm wearing this big scary mask! I'd better take it off before I start talking to the natives.

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh - It's a monster!

lines.speaker: Rionasta
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh!!
